programme.title: Jin Khoja Tin
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Kabir's doha "Jin Khoja Tin" where he says if you try hard enough, then you will definitely find your way. One must never give up trying as only then he can find. S01 E33.

programme.title: Shram Hi Hota Hai
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar elucidates on Kabir's doha "Shram Hi Hota Hai'. He says hard work is very important & if you are patient enough, the world will reward you well & bless you with abundance. S01 E53.

programme.title: Dosh Paraye
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar explains through Kabir's doha "Dosh Paraye" how gossiping can harm relationships. One must look at our own flaws & then point out others, he says try to improve yourself first. S01 E36.

programme.title: Raat Gavaayai
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Kabir's doha "Raat Gavaayai" where he says, life is like a precious diamond that is made up of time, therefore we should make good use of our time to lead a successful. S01 E07.

programme.title: Thothe Badar
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Rahim's doha "Thothe Badar" where he says it's not difficult to digest success in life, but it's very difficult to accept failure after you have failed multiple times. S01 E39.

programme.title: Guru Kumbhar
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Kabir's doha "Guru Kumbhar" where he says, just how a potter slowly moulds clay to make a pot, in the same way a teacher also moulds his/her student to survive in this. S01 E28.

programme.title: Jo Rahim Uttam Prakrit
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar talks about the importance of having a strong character and dignity and explains this in a poignant analogy through Rahim's doha "Jo Rahim Uttam Prakrit". S01 E59.

programme.title: Uttam Vidya
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Vrind's doha "Uttam Vidya" where he says, even if gold is lying in a dirty place, no one leaves it, similarly knowledge, even if possessed by a lowly person, should be. S01 E09.

programme.title: Jaati Na Poocho
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Kabir's doha "Jaati Na Poocho" where he says, just as the value of a sword is judged on basis of its edge & not on sheath, in the same way knowledge should be given. S01 E20.

programme.title: Thour Chhute
programme.desc: Moving away from our roots is currently a popular sentiment today. Javed Akhtar through Vrind's doha "Thour Chhute" says that as much as a person knows English, he must also know his mother. S01 E87.

programme.title: Sahaj Mile
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Kabir's doha "Sahaj Mile" where he says, today every person is become competitive & wants to achieve something but the problem arises when he is ready to do anything to. S01 E21.

programme.title: Chinta Aisi Dakini
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar interprets Kabir's doha "Chinta Aisi Dakini" where he says that the state of mind being anxious is like a fire in the ocean, neither smoke comes out of it nor is it visible to. S01 E74.

programme.title: Nahaye Dohye Kya
programme.desc: Javed Akhtar talks about Kabir's doha "Nahaye Dohye Kya" & explains how adversities toughen a person's character from outside but the real character & relevance is to stay pure & not have. S01 E49.
